prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次约7902名、2026年计划小幅扩招2人（+2.8%）、学校排名持续上升至第24名                        、抖音高热正面曝光、2024年负面声誉已消退、本省物理类考生略减等因素，供需两端基本平衡。，无充分修正依据。预测最低位次约8036名，区间7536–8536名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings (Science/Physics Category) were approximately 4854 → 5051 → 4557 → 7841 → 7902. After the 2024 Heilongjiang college entrance examination reform (Science → Physics Category), rankings shifted significantly backward, with approximately 7841 in 2024 and 7902 in 2025, stabilizing around 7900 in the two years post-reform; the 2025 baseline is approximately 7902. Provincial Science/Physics Category enrollment plans were 69 from 2021 to 2023, increased to 71 in 2024–2025; the 2026 plan is 73, a slight expansion of 2 students (+2.8%) compared to 2025, with limited impact on competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university; its Soft Science Chinese University Rankings have been steadily rising, from 30th in 2021 to 27th in 2024, 25th in 2025, and 24th in 2026, indicating continuously improving comprehensive strength and recognition. In 2024, its reputation was rated as 'clearly negative', mainly due to difficulties in contacting the admissions hotline and unreasonable major settings, causing a sharp drop of about 500 places in the admission score line. However, no new negative records emerged in the 2025–2026 cycle. It ranks 13th in Douyin popularity (high heat), gaining positive exposure through its reputation as 'Beijing's Best Canteen'. No obvious admission gaps were observed. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, it has 7 disciplines rated A- or above: Crop Science A+, Veterinary Medicine A+, Animal Science A+, Grassland Science A+, Food Science and Engineering A+, Plant Protection A, and Biology A, with top-tier agricultural disciplines nationally, strongly attracting applicants to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering are socially hot/highly recommended; Food Science and Engineering (A+), a flagship major, has stable popularity. In 2026, the province has a total of 167,000 examinees, with Physics Category estimated at about 113,894 based on the recent proportion of approximately 68.2%, a decrease of about 3,513 (-3%) from 117,407 in 2025, indicating a slight decline in examinee numbers. China Agricultural University is located in Beijing, making it an inter-provincial application for Heilongjiang candidates. The university has a relatively large enrollment scale in Heilongjiang (over 70 in Physics Category), making it one of the Beijing-based 985 universities with a higher number of slots allocated to Heilongjiang, resulting in a neutral regional preference factor.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of approximately 7902, a slight enrollment expansion of 2 students (+2.8%) in 2026, the university's continuous rise to 24th place, high positive exposure on Douyin, the fading of the 2024 negative reputation, and a slight decrease in provincial Physics Category examinees, supply and demand are basically balanced. There is no sufficient basis for adjustment. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 8036, with a range of 7536–8536.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 7536–8536, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 advantageous disciplines (Food Science, Veterinary Medicine, Agronomy, etc., all A+ disciplines) as the main direction, with Tier 1 popular engineering/science experimental classes as a stretch, and Tier 3 traditional agriculture/forestry majors and Yantai Research Institute majors as safety options. For rankings better than the lower limit (<7536), prioritize Tier 1 flagship majors and popular engineering fields.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: 2025 is the first year with history category admission data, with the lowest ranking approximately 799. Previously from 2021 to 2024, the university only admitted science/physics category students in Heilongjiang, with no reference sequence for liberal arts/history category. In 2025, the history category planned to enroll 6 students, and the 2026 plan remains 6 students, with no expansion or reduction.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; ranked 24th in the 2026 Soft Science ranking, with a continuous upward trend in recent years. In 2024, there were negative public opinions such as poor communication in admissions, but no new negative records in 2025–2026; Douyin popularity ranked 13th (high heat), mainly positive exposure. The university's A- and above disciplines are all in agriculture/life sciences, which have no direct subject mapping with history category majors (Business Administration, Economics), but the overall level of the university still attracts liberal arts candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Social popularity of Economics is divided and wait-and-see; social popularity of Business Administration is clearly discouraging. In 2026, the number of history category candidates in the province is estimated at about 53,106 based on the recent proportion of about 31.8%, slightly decreasing from 54,707 history category candidates in 2025.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Only one year of data (2025, about 799) for history category, enrollment plan remains 6 students, candidate scale slightly decreases, university ranking rises. No basis for adjustment. Predicted lowest ranking approximately 807, range 687–927.
